hero.title: [ES] Online Florida driving courses and license help — in English and Spanish
hero.subtitle: [ES] Not sure which course you need? We help you find the right path — first-time license, teen permit, ticket, suspension, 55+ discount, or new to Florida — and connect you to approved providers and bilingual support.

finder.heading: [ES] Tell us your situation. We'll point you to the right path.
finder.body: [ES] Answer a few quick questions and get a clear recommendation — no guessing course names.

popularCourses.heading: [ES] Popular courses & prep
popularCourses.subheading: [ES] Regulated courses are delivered through approved providers. Prep products are our own educational materials.

packages.heading: [ES] Packages built around your situation
packages.subheading: [ES] Bundles that combine the right course path with prep, guidance, and support.

howItWorks.heading: [ES] How it works
howItWorks.step1Body: [ES] Use the Course Finder or contact us in English or Spanish.
howItWorks.step2Body: [ES] We recommend the correct course, prep, and checklist for you.
howItWorks.step3Body: [ES] Enroll through an approved provider or grab our prep — with help along the way.

trust.heading: [ES] Clear, honest, and local
trust.body: [ES] We're an independent help center focused on West Palm Beach and all of Florida. We don't claim state approval, and we never promise outcomes we can't control — we make the process simpler and bilingual.

leadCta.heading: [ES] Not sure where to start?
leadCta.body: [ES] Send us a quick message and we'll point you to the right next step.
